---
title: "pca_map_1"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-08-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(readxl)
  library(maps)
  library(ggforce)
  library(patchwork)
})

# ---------- Inputs ----------
sap_csv   <- "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/tpj15853-sup-0001-files1 (1).csv"
sorgsd_xl <- "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/13068_2021_2016_MOESM1_ESM (1).xlsx"
pca_vec   <- "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/pca.eigenvec"
pca_val   <- "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/pca.eigenval"

out_png   <- "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/pca_geo_subpops.png"
out_pdf   <- "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/pca_geo_subpops.pdf"

# ---------- Load metadata: SAP ----------
sap_data <- read.csv(sap_csv)[, c(1, 2, 5)]
colnames(sap_data) <- c("Pinumber", "cluster", "Country")
sap_cluster_names <- c("1" = "durra", "2" = "kafir", "3" = "caudatum",
                       "4" = "milo/durra-bicolor", "5" = "mixed/bicolor", "6" = "guinea")
sap_data <- sap_data %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster),
         ClusterName = sap_cluster_names[cluster],
         Set = "SAP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)

# ---------- Load metadata: SorGSD ----------
sorgsd_data <- read_excel(sorgsd_xl)
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- sorgsd_data[1, ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[-1, c(1, 5, 6)]  # PI, Country, cluster
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- c("Pinumber", "Country", "cluster")
sorgsd_data$cluster[sorgsd_data$cluster == "Weedy"] <- "Wild sorghum"
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[sorgsd_data$cluster != "S.propinquum", ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data %>%
  mutate(ClusterName = case_when(
    cluster == "Improved" ~ "Improved",
    cluster == "Landrace" ~ "Landrace",
    cluster == "Wild sorghum" ~ "Wild sorghum",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ),
  Set = "SorGSD") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)

# ---------- Combine metadata ----------
all_meta <- bind_rows(sap_data, sorgsd_data)

# ---------- Load PCA ----------
merged_pca <- read.table(pca_vec, header = FALSE)
colnames(merged_pca) <- c("FID", "IID", paste0("PC", 1:(ncol(merged_pca) - 2)))

# ---------- Merge with metadata ----------
pca_annotated <- inner_join(merged_pca, all_meta, by = c("IID" = "Pinumber"))

# ---------- Reassign Landrace/Improved to nearest SAP centroid ----------
sap_centroids <- pca_annotated %>%
  filter(ClusterName %in% c("durra", "kafir", "caudatum",
                            "milo/durra-bicolor", "mixed/bicolor", "guinea")) %>%
  group_by(ClusterName) %>%
  summarise(PC1_mean = mean(PC1), PC2_mean = mean(PC2), .groups = "drop")

assign_to_sap <- function(pc1, pc2, centroids) {
  dists <- sqrt((centroids$PC1_mean - pc1)^2 + (centroids$PC2_mean - pc2)^2)
  centroids$ClusterName[which.min(dists)]
}

pca_annotated <- pca_annotated %>%
  mutate(ClusterName_new = ifelse(
    ClusterName %in% c("Landrace", "Improved"),
    mapply(assign_to_sap, PC1, PC2, MoreArgs = list(centroids = sap_centroids)),
    ClusterName
  ))

# ---------- Colors ----------
color_vec <- c(
  "durra" = "#FF7F00", "kafir" = "#EBFF33", "caudatum" = "#984EA3",
  "milo/durra-bicolor" = "#F781BF", "mixed/bicolor" = "#A6A6A6",
  "guinea" = "#FF5733", "Wild sorghum" = "#4DAF4A"
)

# ---------- Variance explained ----------
eigenvalues <- scan(pca_val)
variance_explained <- eigenvalues / sum(eigenvalues) * 100
PC1_var <- variance_explained[1]; PC2_var <- variance_explained[2]

# ---------- PCA plot (non-bold titles, single legend) ----------
pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_annotated, aes(PC1, PC2, color = ClusterName_new)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec, name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "on") +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PC1_var, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PC2_var, 1), "%)")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),     # not bold
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    #legend.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 8, 6, 6)
  )

# ---------- Map pie chart (no legend here) ----------
world <- map_data("world")
centroids <- world %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(long = mean(range(long)), lat = mean(range(lat)), .groups = "drop")

map_df <- pca_annotated %>%
  left_join(centroids, by = c("Country" = "region")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(long))

pie_data <- map_df %>%
  group_by(Country, long, lat, ClusterName_new) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  mutate(prop  = n / sum(n),
         angle = 2 * pi * cumsum(prop),
         start = lag(angle, default = 0),
         end   = angle,
         r     = 5)

map_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world, aes(long, lat, group = group),
               fill = "white", color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_arc_bar(data = pie_data,
               aes(x0 = long, y0 = lat, r0 = 0, r = r,
                   start = start, end = end, fill = ClusterName_new),
               alpha = 0.55, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_vec, name = NULL, guide = "none") +
  coord_quickmap(xlim = c(-178, 178), ylim = c(-58, 83), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 8)
  )

# ---------- Combine (Option A): build, then add theme + guides to the patchwork object ----------
combined <- (map_plot | pca_plot) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1), guides = "collect")

# center the single legend and keep it one row
combined <- combined &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center",
    legend.box.margin = margin(0),
    legend.margin = margin(0),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
  )

combined <- combined & guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE))

# ---------- Save ----------
ggsave(out_png, combined, width = 12, height = 4.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave(out_pdf, combined, width = 12, height = 4.5)

ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/map_plot.pdf", map_plot, width = 12, height = 4.5)
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/pca_plot.pdf", pca_plot, width = 12, height = 4.5)

```
